projects.title: The Harry and Hermione Artbook
projects.summary: The Harry and Hermione artbook was a project created by me (IckleRonnikens) as a tribute towards the many artists within the Harmony community by showcasing all of the artwork created up to that point (10th June 2022) that had been accumulated by my from the best artists in the fandom.
projects.description: The Harry and Hermione artbook was a project created by me (IckleRonnikens) as a tribute towards the many artists within the Harmony community by showcasing all of the artwork created up to that point (10th June 2022) that had been accumulated by my from the best artists in the fandom.

projects.title: The Harry and Hermione Magazine
projects.summary: The Harry and Hermione magazine was a project created by me (IckleRonnikens) and along with the help of several users from the Harmony discord (see accredited users on pg 82) to one against showcase Harmony art, as well as combining it with ficticious stories and articles about our favourite duo from the franchise.
projects.description: The Harry and Hermione magazine was a project created by me (IckleRonnikens) and along with the help of several users from the Harmony discord (see accredited users on pg 82) to one against showcase Harmony art, as well as combining it with ficticious stories and articles about our favourite duo from the franchise.

projects.title: Harmony for Humanity
projects.summary: A 140+ page Harmony Artbook, complete with 22 new artworks from beloved harmony artists ( + 22 bonus accompanying short stories & extra goodies), was created as part of the Harmony for Humanity charity fanart event to raise funds for displaced families. The digital artbook is avaialble for donors only and will not be shared here.
projects.description:
A 140+ page Harmony Artbook, complete with 22 new artworks from beloved harmony artists ( + 22 bonus accompanying short stories & extra goodies), was created as part of the Harmony for Humanity charity fanart event to raise funds for displaced families. The digital artbook is avaialble for donors only and will not be shared here.

More information can be found here.
